description: An affordable basic health plan for young, healthy individuals. No coverage for pre-existing conditions.
fine_print: Applicant must be a non-smoker aged 18-35 with no pre-existing conditions. Claims for pre-existing conditions will be denied.

description: A mid-tier plan for adults up to age 50. Covers some pre-existing conditions but excludes smokers.
fine_print: Covers diabetes and physiotherapy. Applicant must be a non-smoker aged 18-50. Cancer, organ transplant, and mental health are excluded.

description: A comprehensive premium plan with wide coverage including smokers and pre-existing conditions.
fine_print: Full coverage for smokers and pre-existing conditions including diabetes, heart disease, and cancer. Age limit 18-65. Cosmetic, experimental, and organ transplant excluded.

description: Designed for senior citizens aged 55-80. Covers pre-existing conditions but does not cover smokers.
fine_print: Senior plan for ages 55-80. Smokers are strictly excluded. Covers heart disease and diabetes. Cancer, transplants, and mental health not covered.

description: A family-friendly plan for adults aged 25-55. Budget-conscious with moderate coverage. No smoker coverage.
fine_print: Family plan for ages 25-55. No smokers. Does not cover pre-existing conditions. Includes maternity and pediatric care.

description: The only budget plan that accepts smokers. Limited coverage, strict age cap.
fine_print: Accepts smokers aged 18-45. Does NOT cover pre-existing conditions, cancer, heart disease, diabetes, or mental health. Only covers respiratory and basic care.

description: The most comprehensive plan with no restrictions on smoking or pre-existing conditions. Highest premium.
fine_print: No restrictions. Covers all ages 18-80, smokers, and all pre-existing conditions. Highest premium tier. Only cosmetic surgery excluded.

description: Ultra-affordable plan for students and young adults aged 18-26. Minimal coverage.
fine_print: Student-only plan for ages 18-26. No smokers, no pre-existing conditions. Bare minimum emergency and hospitalization coverage. 12-month waiting period.

description: Specialized plan focused on mental health coverage for non-smokers up to age 50.
fine_print: Specialized mental wellness plan. Non-smokers aged 18-50. Covers pre-existing mental health conditions. Does not cover cancer, heart disease, maternity, or surgical procedures.

description: Dedicated maternity and pediatric plan for women aged 21-42. Non-smokers only.
fine_print: Maternity-focused plan for non-smoking women aged 21-42. No pre-existing conditions covered. Comprehensive maternity and newborn care included.

description: Specialized plan for diabetic patients. Non-smokers aged 30-65.
fine_print: Diabetes-focused plan for non-smokers aged 30-65. Comprehensive diabetes management including insulin, monitoring, and related complications like cataract surgery. Cancer and transplants excluded.

description: Specialized heart disease coverage plan for non-smokers aged 40-75.
fine_print: Heart-disease focused plan for non-smokers aged 40-75. Covers cardiac procedures, bypass surgery, and related diabetes management. Cancer and organ transplants excluded.

description: Bare minimum emergency-only coverage at the lowest possible price for healthy adults.
fine_print: Emergency-only coverage for healthy non-smokers aged 18-40. No checkups, no chronic condition coverage. Highest deductible. Strictly for catastrophic emergencies.

description: Mid-to-high tier plan for smokers with pre-existing conditions aged 30-60.
fine_print: Smoker-friendly plan for ages 30-60. Covers diabetes, heart disease, and respiratory conditions. Cancer, organ transplants, and mental health excluded.

description: Enhanced senior plan covering cancer for non-smokers aged 60-80. Higher premium than basic senior.
fine_print: Enhanced senior plan for non-smokers aged 60-80. Unlike the basic Senior plan, this covers cancer treatment. Organ transplants still excluded.
